commands.review_summary:
Updates the Codex plugin app-server resolver, tests, docs, and changelog so implicit local stdio defaults read Codex requirements and pick allowed guardian approval, reviewer, and sandbox values, including hostname-scoped remote sandbox rules.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection gives a high-confidence path: current main unconditionally resolves implicit local stdio defaults to YOLO and forwards those values to Codex requests, so a managed requirements file that rejects `never`, `user`, or `danger-full-access` can reject the start path.
commands.review_followup: No repair job is needed: the latest head has no narrow source-backed blocker after prior feedback, so this should continue through normal maintainer review and merge checks.

target.title: fix: respect Codex requirements for app-server defaults
